headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on M&T Bank, Raises Price Target to $271
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Manan Gosalia   maintains M&T Bank (NYSE:MTB) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $251 to $271.
